ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Release year of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the movie */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer of the movie */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer of the movie */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "number_of_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of users who have rated the movie */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "country_of_production" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the actor in meters */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the actor's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actor" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the movie */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "billing_position" INTEGER /* Position of the actor in the credits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ai_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AI model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the AI model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the AI model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the AI model */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data used for the AI model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the AI model was trained */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of AI model (e.g., language model, conversational model) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AI model */,
  "question" TEXT /* Movie-related question */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer provided by the AI model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the AI model's answer */,
  "test_set_size" INTEGER /* Size of the test set used to evaluate the model */,
  "test_set_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the test set */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "question")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "spoiler_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the review contains spoilers */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "favorite_genres" TEXT /* User's favorite genres (comma-separated list) */,
  "watched_movies" TEXT /* List of movie IDs that the user has watched (comma-separated list) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
